overview: How to read a result file, in plain terms: for each repetition, the runner sends ONE prompt to the agent — the task scenario (scenario + Go code) plus, on 'vuln' tasks only, an NF-context hint and a CVSS instructions block asking the agent to also output, per finding, a vector (all 11 base metrics AV/AC/AT/PR/UI/VC/VI/VA/SC/SI/SA since 2026-07-10; runs before that asked only the 8 vulnerable-system metrics) and a score. The textual answer is scored by a second LLM (the judge, Blocco A) against the task rubric — that produces 'verdict' and 'judge_score'. The CVSS estimate, when present, is scored separately by a deterministic Python script (Blocco B, utils.cvss_eval) against the ground-truth dataset (File_Free5gc_Vulnerabili/cve_metrics_normalized.json) — no LLM involved, and it never affects 'verdict'. Hyperparameters: model + judge_model come from config.MODELS; temperature (config.TEMPERATURE) is shared by agent and judge calls and is kept > 0 so that 'repetitions' (config.REPETITIONS — the same prompt run N independent times) capture real sampling variance, not just parsing noise. Don't confuse repetitions with retries (config.MAX_RETRIES): a retry happens *within* one repetition when the judge says 'wrong' and attempts remain — the agent sees only its own previous answer, never the judge's feedback or the ground truth. See history[] for the per-attempt record and final_answer/verdict/judge_score/cvss_eval for the outcome actually kept for that repetition.
description: Schema for result JSON generated by the experiment runner for textual (LLM-judged) tasks. One file per (task, experiment, role, model); all repetitions are stored in the top-level 'repetitions' array.
structure: run_config fields at top level + 'repetitions' array (one entry per repetition)

run_config.description: Identifies what ran: task, setup, role, model. Common across all repetitions — stored once at the top level of the file.

task_id.description: Task identifier parsed from docs/tasks/<task>.md metadata.

task_type.description: Task type parsed from metadata (expected: textual).

agent_role.description: Role used for the run (expert or beginner).

model.description: LLM model used for agent calls.

judge_model.description: LLM model used as judge (resolved from config at save time).

temperature.description: Generation temperature used for both agent and judge calls (from config.TEMPERATURE).

is_hosted.description: True if the model was called via a hosted API (Ollama Cloud, Google), False for local Ollama. Reflected in the filename prefix hosted_.

task_path.description: Filesystem path to the task markdown used for this run.

sol_path.description: Filesystem path to the solution markdown with rubric JSON.

repetitions.description: Array of per-repetition results. Each entry contains timing, agent outputs, judge evaluation, and resource usage.

timing.description: Wall-clock timestamps and elapsed duration for the full repetition.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the repetition finished.

elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds for the repetition.

agent.description: Agent outputs: all attempts in history, then the final selected answer.

attempts.description: Number of LLM calls within the repetition (1 = no retry needed).

history.description: Per-attempt records. Each entry: answer, reasoning, confidence, cvss_estimate (only on 'vuln' textual tasks, see below), elapsed_seconds (agent call wall-clock), tokens_in, tokens_out, prompt_system, prompt_user (includes the NF context hint and CVSS instructions block on 'vuln' tasks, injected by utils.cvss_utils.inject_cvss_instructions — the task .md file itself is untouched), judge_score (per-criterion breakdown with judge_elapsed_seconds), verdict.

final_answer.description: Clean subset of history[-1]: answer, reasoning, confidence, cvss_estimate (if present). For quick access without traversing full history.

cvss_estimate.description: Present only on textual 'vuln' tasks with CVSS_ESTIMATE_ENABLED=True (config.py). Parsed from the agent's '### CVSS Estimate' markdown section into {"findings": [{"function", "vector", "score"}, ...]} — one entry per finding the agent reported. Appears both per-attempt (history[n].cvss_estimate) and in final_answer.cvss_estimate. Never seen by the judge (Blocco A) — evaluated separately and deterministically, see cvss_eval below.

judge.description: Judge evaluation of the final answer against the rubric.

verdict.description: Correctness verdict: correct if normalized_score >= TEXTUAL_PASS_RATIO, else wrong.

judge_score.description: Per-criterion rubric scores plus derived summary fields.

*_score.description: Per-criterion score fields defined by the task rubric (names vary per task).

total_score.description: Sum of per-criterion scores; computed from rubric fields if missing.

normalized_score.description: total_score / rubric total_max — in [0, 1]; threshold is TEXTUAL_PASS_RATIO (0.7).

judge_elapsed_seconds.description: Wall-clock elapsed seconds for the judge call on the last attempt. Per-attempt judge elapsed is in history[n].judge_score.judge_elapsed_seconds.

cvss_eval.description: Blocco B — deterministic evaluation of final_answer.cvss_estimate against the ground-truth dataset (File_Free5gc_Vulnerabili/cve_metrics_normalized.json). No LLM involved; never influences 'verdict'. Only computed once per repetition (on the final answer), not per attempt. Null when the task_id has no CVEs mapped in the dataset (e.g. task9_vuln_cross, see docs/02_risultati_cvss_run1.md F4) or the task is not a 'vuln' task.

estimate_provided.description: Whether the agent produced any CVSS finding at all.

n_findings.description: Number of findings the agent reported.

n_target_cves.description: Number of ground-truth CVEs expected for this task (in-excerpt only, unless '_full' task variant).

matched.description: Findings successfully paired to a ground-truth CVE by handler function name (utils.cvss_eval._match_finding). Each entry: cve_id, estimated_score, published_score, published_score_type (B|BT), score_band_vs_published, score_band_vs_B (points per config.CVSS_SCORE_BANDS), exploitability_match (0-5, on AV/AC/AT/PR/UI), impact_match (0-3, on VC/VI/VA — the discriminating signal on this dataset), estimated_vector, published_vector (full GT vector string, including Subsequent/Threat metrics excluded from scoring). Official-math fields (post call 11, FIRST CVSS 4.0 algorithm via the 'cvss' library): computed_score_B (base score recomputed from the estimated vector; padded_metrics lists SC/SI/SA padded to N when the agent omitted them), score_coherence_delta (|declared score − computed_score_B| — internal consistency, the two agent outputs are independent), computed_delta_vs_B + score_band_computed_vs_B (recomputed score vs GT pure base score — vector distance in official score space), exploitability_distance / impact_distance (ordinal severity distance per group, normalized [0,1], missing/invalid field counts as 1.0), subsequent_match (0-3) / subsequent_distance (0-1) on SC/SI/SA — present only when the agent emitted the triad (requested since 2026-07-10; padding would auto-match the GT, where SC/SI/SA are always N), hamming_distance (0-8, differing fields among the 8 vulnerable-system metrics, kept at 8 for comparability with runs 1-3). Absent on results saved before the official-math upgrade — rerun 'python -m utils.cvss_eval' to backfill.

missed_cves.description: CVE ids expected for this task that no finding was matched to.

unmatched_findings.description: Number of agent findings that could not be paired to any candidate CVE (counted separately, never penalized — see docs/02_risultati_cvss_run1.md F6).

aggregates.description: Per-repetition means over 'matched' only: avg_score_band_vs_published, avg_score_band_vs_B, avg_exploitability_match (0-5), avg_impact_match (0-3), plus official-math means avg_score_coherence_delta, avg_computed_delta_vs_B, avg_score_band_computed_vs_B, avg_exploitability_distance (0-1), avg_impact_distance (0-1), avg_subsequent_match (0-3) / avg_subsequent_distance (0-1) (null when no matched finding emitted SC/SI/SA), avg_hamming_distance (0-8). Null fields if 'matched' is empty.

resources.description: Token usage for the repetition (agent and judge calls separately).

tokens.description: Token counts from Ollama; null if the provider did not return them.

agent_in.description: Prompt tokens consumed by agent calls, aggregated across all retry attempts. Per-attempt value is in history[n].tokens_in.

agent_out.description: Completion tokens produced by agent calls, aggregated across all retry attempts. Per-attempt value is in history[n].tokens_out.

judge_in.description: Prompt tokens consumed by judge calls, aggregated across all retry attempts. Note: per-attempt judge tokens are not saved individually (only elapsed is, in history[n].judge_score.judge_elapsed_seconds).

judge_out.description: Completion tokens produced by judge calls, aggregated across all retry attempts.
